topics: Realize an asynchronous BCD counter in VHDL and implement on FPGA
Realize a 4-bit Gray to Binary in VHDL and implement on FPGA
Realize the flipflops D, JK and T in VHDL and implement on FPGA

Realize in VHDL a 4-bit ALU that performs basic arithmetic (addition, subtraction) and logic (and, xor) operations on 4-bit inputs and implement on FPGA. Understand the synthesis reports and perform timing and power analysis.
